subject: Matching Warp/Relion particles with the original Dynamo tags
body:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to match the particles from Warp and Relion 5 refinements back 
to the original Dynamo tag numbers. This is helpful for i.e. a VLP dataset 
where after excluding bad particles and running 3D classification to filter 
out junk particles, analyzing the number of remaining good particles per 
VLP. 

It seems that 1) after CC filtering particles and excluding particles 
within a threshold distance in Dynamo, the table gets reversed (no 
problem), then 2) when Warp exports particles it renumbers everything from 
1, and then 3) somewhere along the way, the particles get scrambled for 
each tomogram in the star file.

I can track the exact particles based on tomogram and xyz coordinates / 
euler angles between the Dynamo table and the star file from the Warp 
extracted particles, but I'm wondering if this anyone has already done this 
or if other roadblocks have been found along the way. Thanks!

Matt
